subject: A cluster of hooded, robed villagers performing a ritual sacrifice at night; the central figure raises a limp body in their arms while surrounding figures lift their hands in supplication or chant
description: A claustrophobic, dimly lit scene shows a tight cluster of hooded villagers in red and dark robes pressed together at night. The central robed figure lifts a pale, limp body upward with both arms, an offering posture. Around them, other cultists raise bare hands skyward, fingers splayed. The figures' faces are largely lost in shadow under their hoods, lending an anonymous, ceremonial quality. Warm reddish underlighting picks out the robes against a near-black background, evoking firelight and dread. The composition is dense and crowded, all the action pushed into the foreground, with no visible sky or horizon.
foreground: central robed figure raising a body, surrounded by hooded cultists with hands lifted
background: black void with faint red ambient glow, no visible architecture or sky
emotion: fervent, devotional, ominous; faces obscured but bodies tensed in worship or supplication
